task_completion.description: Create a new log recorder with the specified name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is on the 'New Log Recorder' page or configuration page, and the name 'git-debug-recorder' is entered in the name field or displayed as the title.

task_completion.description: Add the hudson.plugins.git logger and set its level to FINE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the log recorder configuration, there is a logger entry with the name 'hudson.plugins.git' and its corresponding log level dropdown is set to 'FINE'.

task_completion.description: Add the org.jenkinsci.plugins.gitclient logger and set its level to FINE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the log recorder configuration, there is a logger entry with the name 'org.jenkinsci.plugins.gitclient' and its corresponding log level dropdown is set to 'FINE'.

task_completion.description: Add the com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials logger and set its level to WARNING.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the log recorder configuration, there is a logger entry with the name 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials' and its corresponding log level dropdown is set to 'WARNING'.
The configuration is saved, evidenced by the agent clicking 'Save' and subsequently viewing the 'git-debug-recorder' dashboard page or seeing it listed on the main 'System Log' page.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jenkins web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a genuine web browser navigating the Jenkins UI (e.g., Manage Jenkins -> System Log), not a text editor, mockup, or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent configured the log recorder via the standard UI, not by executing Groovy scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the 'Add new log recorder' and configuration forms, rather than pasting code into the Jenkins Script Console.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely inputted the logger names and selected the levels.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into the logger name fields and interacting with the log level dropdown menus.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target log recorder must be named exactly 'git-debug-recorder'. It requires three specific loggers with exact standard Java logging levels: 'hudson.plugins.git' at FINE, 'org.jenkinsci.plugins.gitclient' at FINE, and 'com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials' at WARNING. These are valid Jenkins plugin packages and standard logging levels.
